name: integrate
description: Integrate an entity into the coherence network. Entities: individual (collaborator), entity (org/company), repo (git), resource (API/service/model), platform (X/Telegram/Signal). The onboarding process IS the coherence — WAVE scoring, isomorphism mapping, and ATOM trail creation happen as a single self-completing pipeline. Entities with WAVE > 70% snap in automatically.

kind.description: What kind of thing is being integrated

origin.description: Where this entity currently lives (URL, handle, address)

capabilities.description: What the entity brings — capabilities, content, signal

connections.description: Existing connections — who/what does this entity already touch?

intent.description: What the entity needs — what it's looking for in the network
